Maintainers of audio/xwave and security/openssh-portable,

The PR at [1] has just been submitted containing some trivial spelling fixes.  If you approve, please reply to this email and a developer will deal with the patch for you.

Thanks!

Chris Rees (masquerading as a GNATS auto-assigner bot)
